name: flow
description: Unified toolkit for Context-Driven Development with spec-first planning, TDD workflow, and Beads integration

interface.shortDescription: Auto-route `.agents/` projects into Flow planning, refinement, implementation, and knowledge workflows
defaultPrompt: Use the Flow skill to set up this project
Use the Flow skill to create a PRD for user authentication
Use the Flow skill to refine this spec so a lightweight implementer can execute it correctly on the first pass
Use the Flow skill to implement the current flow with TDD and preserved context
